chapter_title.en: Chapter 107 – The merits for the poor Muslims

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/359)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/359)
text: لَيْسَ لِمُصَاصِ شِيعَتِنَا فِي دَوْلَةِ الْبَاطِلِ إِلَّا الْقُوتُ شَرِّقُوا إِنْ شِئْتُمْ أَوْ غَرِّبُوا لَنْ تُرْزَقُوا إِلَّا الْقُوتَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Nuh Bin Shuayb and Abu Is’haq Al Khaffaf, from A man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is nothing for our<sup>asws</sup> sincere Shia in the government of the falsehood except for the bare necessities. They can go east if they so like to, or west, they will never be Graced except with the bare necessities’.
en.sarwar: 7. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Nuh ibn Shu’ayb and abu Ishaq al-Khaffaf from a man from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “For our pure Shi’a (followers) there is nothing under the rule of the unjust power more than bare necessities. Westernize or Easternize, you will never gain more than bare necessities.”
